commit.message:
feat: dynamic skybox, enemy rotation, power-ups, enhanced weapons

- Skybox: slow rotation for dynamic space feel
- Enemies: face player (180° Y rotation), distinct tint colors per type
- Enemy banking animation on horizontal movement
- Boss: pulsing color tint that changes by phase
- Player: distinct ship tint colors, enhanced weapon at power 4+
- Missiles: side-shots at power level 3+ for all ship types
- Power-up drops: every 5 enemy kills drops a power-up item
- More enemy waves per stage (6-7 waves instead of 3)
- Player ship type-specific tint (blue/green/orange)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(gui): UI/UX redesign — design tokens, interaction improvements, tabbed settings, error recovery (#14)

* feat(styles): add Spacing/Radius design tokens, eliminate inline styles, theme-aware combo arrows

- Add Spacing class with 10-level scale (2px-48px) based on 4px base unit
- Add Radius class with semantic tokens (FORM=6, PANEL=10, PILL=12, INNER=5)
- Replace all hardcoded border-radius/spacing values in QSS with tokens (28 refs)
- Eliminate 3 avoidable inline setStyleSheet calls (separator, toolbar, canvas)
  via ObjectName + central QSS approach
- Document 2 necessary inline styles (matplotlib dialog, column selector dynamic state)
- Create theme-aware combo_arrow_dark.svg and combo_arrow_light.svg
- Fix splash screen to use Colors tokens instead of hardcoded hex values
- Add comprehensive tests for new token classes (14 new tests)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat(gui): improve UX with control hierarchy, empty state, and interaction gaps

Wave 2 of UI/UX redesign:

- Simplify empty state: replace verbose 8-line tutorial with focused 2-line
  message + drag-and-drop hint
- Add drag-and-drop CSV file support (dragEnterEvent/dropEvent)
- Remove cache clear button from toolbar (kept in Tools menu with Ctrl+Shift+K)
- Add keyboard shortcuts: Ctrl+G (G-quality), Ctrl+Shift+A (show all),
  Ctrl+Shift+C (compare), Ctrl+Shift+K (cache clear)
- Show tooltips with keyboard shortcut hints
- Hide mode/view badges when no data loaded (reduce noise in empty state)
- Widen splitter handle to 8px with hover/pressed visual feedback
- Set table to read-only (NoEditTriggers)
- Add completion state to progress bar (checkmark + text instead of auto-hide)
- Persist window geometry and splitter ratio via QSettings

Addresses Critical issues C1, C2 and Major issues M4, M7, M9, plus
Minor issues m1, m2 from the design audit.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat(gui): convert settings dialog to tabbed layout

Wave 3 of UI/UX redesign:

- Replace single QScrollArea with 4-tab QTabWidget:
  基本 (Data Input + Performance), 表示 (Display),
  解析 (Analysis + G-quality), エクスポート (Export)
- Add _widget_tab_map for validation-driven tab switching:
  on validation error, auto-switch to the tab containing the offending field
- Change _validate() return type to list[tuple[str, QWidget|None]] to carry
  widget references for tab switching
- Add per-tab tab order management (_setup_tab_order)
- Add QTabWidget/QTabBar QSS styles using design tokens
- Add helper methods: _create_tab_content, _wrap_in_scroll, _switch_to_field_tab

Addresses Critical issue C3 (settings dialog is flat list of 21+ params)
from the design audit.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat(gui): add recovery actions to error dialogs

Wave 4 of UI/UX redesign:

- Enhance _show_error_dialog to accept optional action buttons dict
  {label: callback} with ActionRole buttons + Close button
- Add '設定を開く' recovery action to column detection errors
  (time column not found, acceleration column not found)
- Add '再試行' + '設定を開く' to main file processing errors
- Add '設定を開く' to G-quality analysis errors
- Every error dialog now offers at least one recovery action path

Addresses Major issue M8 (error states lack recovery paths) from
the design audit.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(gui): address review findings from code-review and critic agents

Fixes identified by 3 independent review agents:

- Fix drag-drop race condition: clear _pending_drop_files in re-entrancy
  guard to prevent stale files from being silently processed later
- Add event.acceptProposedAction() in dropEvent for proper Qt DnD protocol
- Prevent splitter pane collapse: setChildrenCollapsible(False)
- Restore Ctrl+O hint in empty state text; clarify 'CSVファイル' not just 'ファイル'
- Use QMessageBox.Ok (not Close) when no recovery actions present
- Use default QSettings() constructor to match app organization name
- Add offscreen detection after restoreGeometry (multi-monitor safety)
- Guard progress auto-hide timer against re-entrancy (skip if still processing)
- Fix Spacing docstring (was falsely claiming 4px base unit)
- Remove dead combo_arrow.svg asset (replaced by themed variants)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* test(gui): add 18 tests for settings dialog tab widget conversion

Tests cover:
- Tab structure: QTabWidget presence, 4 tabs, correct labels
- Tab content: each tab wraps content in QScrollArea with QGroupBox
- Widget-tab mapping: all 19 widgets mapped to correct tab indices
- Validation tab switching: _switch_to_field_tab navigates correctly
- Tab order: per-tab keyboard navigation chains
- Backwards compatibility: get_settings, _reset_to_defaults unchanged

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat(gui): fix accessibility, colormap, error feedback, and dialog polish

Wave 5 of UI/UX redesign addressing post-PR14 audit findings:

- Replace rainbow colormap with CVD-safe tab10 (plot_controller.py)
- Add user feedback when graph update fails (main_window.py)
- Modernize range_analysis_dialog (modal, validation, empty state, read-only)
- Add empty-list guards to column_selector_dialog
- Add ToggleSwitch disabled visual state (opacity reduction)
- Extract matplotlib dialog styles to styles.py with Spacing/Radius tokens
- Extract DEFAULT_WIDTH/HEIGHT constants for window centering
- Move imports out of ToggleSwitch.paintEvent to module level
- Add 5 missing accessibility names in main_window
- Fix worker deleteLater race condition (capture error before delete)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(gui): address Wave 5 review findings

- Fix empty-data guard: check stats['count'] > 0, not bool(dict)
- Fix column_selector ValueError: validate before super().__init__()
- Fix colormap: tab10 → tab20 for ≥6 dataset support
- Strengthen test_range_normalization: verify actual label text
- Add colormap uniqueness + CVD safety tests
- Add zero-count stats empty state test
- Simplify redundant hasattr assertion

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(gui): defer error dialog action callbacks to after processing cleanup

_show_error_dialog executed action callbacks synchronously while
_is_processing was still True, causing the re-entrancy guard to block
retry actions. Using QTimer.singleShot(0) defers execution until after
the finally block resets _is_processing.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix hard-coded Hostx64 path to support arm64 and x86 hosts

commit.message:
fix: healing monitor artifact path regression from #692 (#706)

* fix: heal monitor artifact path — download to workspace root not test-results/

Artifact 'playwright-results-chromium' contains test-results/results.json
as its internal path. Downloading to path: test-results/ caused double
nesting (test-results/test-results/results.json), so healing-monitor.js
reported 0/126 tests passing and exited 1.

Fix: download to workspace root (path: .) so test-results/results.json
lands at the expected location. Added continue-on-error: true so the
monitor job doesn't hard-fail if the artifact is temporarily unavailable.

Regression introduced in #692 (matrix parallelisation).
Closes #704

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: npm audit fix — resolve basic-ftp CRLF injection vulnerability

GHSA-6v7q-wjvx-w8wg: basic-ftp <=5.2.1 high severity
Pre-existing vulnerability, not related to healing monitor fix.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add complete Grafana SQL query with SAI stat name mappings

grafana_query.sql contains:
- Main panel query with auto-downsampling, time range variables,
  and human-readable series names (e.g. Ethernet16_Port_IfInOctets)
- Variable queries for sai_type_id (shows 'Port' not '1')
  and sai_stat_id (shows 'IfInOctets (0)' not '0')
- 291 stat name mappings across 4 SAI object types:
  Port (204), Queue (47), BufferPool (25), IngressPriorityGroup (15)
- JOIN only on aggregated results (few thousand rows), not on raw data

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(phase3): Production Hardening & Sub-Agent Integration (#463)

* test(weakness+embedding+vector+redis): Sprint 13 coverage

- test_weakness_remediator.py: 37 tests covering all main flows, error handling, scoring, goal crafting
- test_embedding_provider.py: +16 tests for missing paths (_MissingPackage, edge cases, error handling)
- test_vector_store_v2.py: 17 tests covering VectorStoreV2 delegation to parent class
- test_redis_cache.py: +20 tests for error handling, lazy init, various data types

Coverage results:
- core/weakness_remediator.py: 99% (70/70 statements) ✅
- memory/embedding_provider.py: 100% (77/77 statements) ✅
- memory/vector_store_v2.py: 100% (10/10 statements) ✅
- memory/redis_cache_adapter.py: 93% (67/70 statements) ✅

All 118 tests pass.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* test(neo4j+learning): Sprint 13 coverage

Add comprehensive test coverage for three memory modules:
- neo4j_bridge.py: 96% coverage (126/130 stmts)
- lesson_store.py: 100% coverage (41/41 stmts)
- learning_loop.py: 100% coverage (29/29 stmts)

Tests cover:
- Circuit breaker pattern (open, closed, half-open states)
- Neo4j driver initialization and connection handling
- Query and write operations with circuit breaker integration
- Codebase graph import functionality
- Brain synchronization
- Schema information retrieval
- File I/O and persistence
- Lesson derivation and injection
- Async record_cycle with lesson and debug report handling
- Edge cases: empty files, malformed JSON, empty lines

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* test(cache-factory+momento+mcp): Sprint 13 coverage

- test_cache_adapter_factory.py: Complete coverage of factory functions
  * create_cache_adapter() with/without MOMENTO_API_KEY
  * get_adapter() for all types (local, momento, redis)
  * Error handling for invalid adapter types

- test_momento_adapter.py: Extended coverage to 77%
  * 20+ new tests for cache operations (get/set/delete)
  * Circuit breaker edge cases
  * List operations and publish functionality
  * Mock client integration tests

- test_mcp_cli.py: Added 50+ new tests for remaining gaps
  * HTTP client request handling and timeouts
  * Timeout configuration and env variable expansion
  * Tool listing, grep, and handler functions
  * Error handling and edge cases
  * All 239 tests passing

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(blockers): add aura package root, error_resolution module, ast_analyzer timeout fix

- aura/__init__.py: missing package root caused all aura.* imports to fail
- aura/error_resolution/: new module required by existing tests
  - types.py: CacheKey, ResolutionConfidence, ResolutionResult dataclasses
  - safety.py: SafetyChecker — safe/sensitive/dangerous command classification
  - cache.py: LRUCache (L1) + SQLiteCache (L2, TTL) + FourLayerCache
  - engine.py: cache → known-fix → AI provider resolution pipeline
- agents/skills/ast_analyzer.py: replace recursive _max_nesting_depth with
  iterative stack implementation to avoid recursion limit / test timeout

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test(agents): cover synthesizer, ingest, mutator, registry — 115 new tests

SynthesizerAgent (15): goal/title, plan→intent, critique merging, file/test defaults
IngestAgent (22): _snapshot exclusions, run with/without ContextManager, hints parsing
MutatorAgent (30): path validation, ADD_FILE, REPLACE_IN_FILE, JSON mutations, edge cases
registry (48): FALLBACK_CAPABILITIES, _make_spec, _lazy_import caching,
  PlannerAdapter, CriticAdapter, ActAdapter (helpers + run + AURA_TARGET directive),
  SandboxAdapter (dry_run, skip, pass/fail, snippet_count)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test(skill_dispatcher): cover classify_goal, dispatch_skills, SkillMetrics, SkillChainer — 53 new tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test(core+agents): cover GoalQueue, ConvergenceEscapeLoop, ApplicatorAgent — 90 new tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(prd-003): add LearningCoordinator, LearningArtifact types, learning loop — 106 tests

Port PRD-003 autonomous learning loop from claude/implement-ascm-v2-gSGye:
- core/learning_types.py: LearningArtifact dataclass (ARTIFACT_TYPES, SEVERITIES)
- core/learning_coordinator.py: LearningCoordinator with on_cycle_complete(),
  generate_backlog(), get_recent_artifacts(), _insight_to_goal()
- core/orchestrator.py + core/orchestrator_learn.py: wire coordinator into
  _record_cycle_outcome(); Phase 10 drains backlog into goal queue
- aura_cli/runtime_factory.py: instantiate + attach LearningCoordinator
- tests/test_learning_types.py: 33 tests for LearningArtifact
- tests/test_learning_coordinator.py: 34 tests for coordinator logic
- tests/test_learning_loop.py: 39 tests for CycleOutcome, QualitySnapshot,
  AdaptivePipeline, AutonomousDiscovery

Smoke test confirms artifacts=1 goals=[] for low-severity cycle learning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs(prd-003): add design spec for LearningCoordinator + 106 tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test(core+skills): cover GoalArchive, HumanGate, SkillBase, TypeCheckerSkill — 78 new tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test(skills): cover CodeCloneDetector, TestCoverageAnalyzer — 47 new tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test(skills): cover LinterEnforcerSkill, _check_naming, _run_flake8 — 31 new tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test(core): cover GitTools init, commit_all, rollback, stash — 16 new tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test(memory): cover Brain remember/recall/tagged/set-get/weaknesses — 35 new tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(phase3): Complete Production Hardening & Sub-Agent Integration

This commit completes Phase 3 development with 173 new tests:

New Modules:
- aura/learning/ - Autonomous learning loop (feedback, patterns, optimization)
- aura/observability/ - Metrics and distributed tracing
- aura/semantic/ - Semantic context graph and relevance scoring
- core/subagent_integration.py - Sub-agent registry
- core/orchestrator_subagents.py - Orchestrator mixin

Phase 2 Sub-Agent Integration:
- IOTA: Error resolution → Error handling phase
- KAPPA: Recording → Workflow recording
- NU: Offline mode → Connectivity checks
- PI: Encryption → Config loading
- RHO: Health → Pre-flight validation
- SIGMA: Security → Security gate
- TAU: Scheduler → Background tasks

TUI Enhancements:
- observability_panel.py - Real-time metrics/traces
- health_panel.py - Component health status

Test Coverage:
- tests/aura/learning/ - 25 tests
- tests/aura/observability/ - 71 tests
- tests/aura/semantic/ - 25 tests
- tests/core/ - 49 sub-agent tests

Refs: Phase 3 milestone
